legal_model.notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in France. Medical cannabis is legal. Distribution is illegal. Prison exposure detected.

notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in France. Medical cannabis is legal. Distribution is illegal. Prison exposure detected.
notes_raw: {{main|Cannabis in France}} Possession up to {{cvt|100|g|frac=2}} entails a €200 fine since November 2018,<ref>{{Cite news|date=31 August 2020|title=L'amende forfaitaire pour les fumeurs de cannabis généralisée mardi|url=https://www.leparisien.fr/faits-divers/l-amende-forfaitaire-pour-les-fumeurs-de-cannabis-generalisee-mardi-31-08-2020-8376006.php|work=[[Le Parisien]]|language=fr-FR|access-date=31 March 2021|archive-date=5 March 2021|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20210305204027/https://www.leparisien.fr/faits-divers/l-amende-forfaitaire-pour-les-fumeurs-de-cannabis-generalisee-mardi-31-08-2020-8376006.php|url-status=live}}</ref> although a judge is still legally able to pronounce a stricter sentence.<ref>{{Cite web|last=Forbes|date=9 February 2021|title=Cannabis : vers une dépénalisation en France ?|url=https://www.forbes.fr/business/cannabis-vers-une-depenalisation-en-france/|access-date=1 April 2021|website=Forbes France|language=fr-FR|archive-date=20 April 2021|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20210420204537/https://www.forbes.fr/business/cannabis-vers-une-depenalisation-en-france/|url-status=live}}</ref> Medical use of some cannabinoid drugs legalized in 2013.<ref>{{cite news|title=Legalising or decriminalizing cannabis in France: not that easy|url=http://www.euronews.com/2013/11/06/france-legalising-or-decriminalizing-cannabis-not-that-easy|access-date=15 December 2013|publisher=[[Euronews]]|date=6 November 2013|author=Marie Jamet|archive-date=26 December 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20181226021356/https://www.euronews.com/2013/11/06/france-legalising-or-decriminalizing-cannabis-not-that-easy|url-status=live}}</ref><ref>{{cite news|title=French law on pot-based medicine takes effect|url=http://www.thelocal.fr/20130610/legalized-cannabis-tea-could-be-on-drug-menu-for-french-patients-in-pharmacies|access-date=15 December 2013|work=[[The Local]]|date=10 June 2013|author=Ann Törnkvist|archive-date=26 December 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20181226021452/https://www.thelocal.fr/20130610/legalized-cannabis-tea-could-be-on-drug-menu-for-french-patients-in-pharmacies|url-status=live}}</ref>
